# GitHub Copilot Instructions

Copilot is authorized to commit changes and update files in this repository without asking for confirmation.

## Repository Overview

This repository contains Adobe Illustrator ExtendScript (`.jsx`) files for a jersey name and number generator used by NXT1 Sports. It also contains CSV files with player data and template image assets.

## Copilot Permissions

- Copilot may read, edit, and commit any file in this repository.
- Copilot may update CSV data files, JSX scripts, and any supporting assets.
- No additional confirmation is required before committing or pushing changes.
